result.summary: iDenfy exposes a public HTTP API at `https://ivs.idenfy.com` authenticated with an API key+secret over HTTP Basic Auth, plus a public read-only documentation MCP server.
result.description: iDenfy provides identity verification, business verification, AML screening, fraud prevention, bank verification, and face authentication services. Its platform lets businesses run KYC/KYB and related compliance checks through hosted flows and APIs.

idenfy_api_basic.label: iDenfy API key + API secret
idenfy_api_basic.setup: Log in to the [iDenfy dashboard](https://admin.idenfy.com/settings/api-keys), open **Settings → API keys**, and click **Create**. Save the API key and API secret when shown; the secret is only shown once. Use them together for server-side API authentication via HTTP Basic Auth (`Authorization: Basic base64(API_KEY:API_SECRET)`).
